_note: Builder test: does this person build/code on camera? If yes, in. If they only talk about what others built, out.
_methodology: YouTube-native builders first. Not Twitter people who happen to have a channel.

youtube_channels.name: Andrej Karpathy
youtube_channels.why_builder: Writes code on camera from scratch. GPT-2, tokenizers, neural nets. Videos are a byproduct of building, not the product.

youtube_channels.name: Yannic Kilcher
youtube_channels.why_builder: Reads actual ML research papers on camera and builds intuition for what the math means in practice. Covers papers as they drop.

youtube_channels.name: Jeremy Howard
youtube_channels.why_builder: Builds deep learning from first principles on camera. fast.ai course is the best 'understand by building' entry point for coders.

youtube_channels.name: George Hotz / geohot
youtube_channels.why_builder: Livestreams writing AI systems without a script. Built comma.ai self-driving stack and tinygrad (from-scratch ML framework). Fights CUDA live.

youtube_channels.name: Sebastian Raschka
youtube_channels.why_builder: Author of 'Build a Large Language Model from Scratch'. Channel follows the book — implements LLMs in PyTorch from first principles.

youtube_channels.name: Umar Jamil
youtube_channels.why_builder: Implements transformers, diffusion models, and RLHF from scratch in code. Highly technical, undersubscribed relative to quality.

youtube_channels.name: Sentdex
youtube_channels.why_builder: YouTube-native builder since 2012. Codes Python/ML/AI live — neural nets, robotics, trading. Rough but real: you watch him build start to finish.

youtube_channels.name: 3Blue1Brown
youtube_channels.why_builder: Not a coder — a visual builder. Constructs mathematical visualizations that make neural nets, attention, and transformers actually click. Took a hiatus in 2025.

youtube_channels.name: Fireship
youtube_channels.why_builder: Best breadth/velocity layer. Ships code demos in under 10 minutes. Covers every significant AI tool within days of release. Builds and sells his own courses.

youtube_channels.name: Theo (t3.gg)
youtube_channels.why_builder: Ships full-stack AI products live. Built T3 Chat in 5 days. Honest developer take on AI tooling — not hype, not theory.
